description_long: This is a tall, modern street light featuring a single, slender pole with a horizontal arm extending outward to support a streamlined lamp head. The pole is straight and tapers slightly as it rises, with a simple, utilitarian design and no visible ornamentation. The lamp head is elongated and aerodynamic, likely made of metal and polycarbonate, and is mounted at the end of the arm for optimal street illumination. The arm is reinforced with two diagonal support rods, providing structural stability. The base of the pole is broad and flat, designed for secure installation into the ground. The overall appearance is functional and minimalistic, suitable for urban streets, highways, or parking lots.
description: A tall, modern street light with a streamlined lamp head on a single, plain pole and a horizontal arm reinforced by support rods. The design is minimalistic and functional, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the pole, the horizontal arm, and the streamlined lamp head with visible support rods.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile of the pole and arm, with the lamp head seen end-on and minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the arm, lamp head, and support rods from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the pole and arm in a straight line, with the lamp head visible from behind and the support rods aligned.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, elongated, and streamlined lamp head with a smooth, aerodynamic profile and no decorative elements; likely features a polycarbonate diffuser.
